Metadata.Title: CVE-2023-44487 affecting package cert-manager for versions less than 1.11.2-5
Metadata.Description: CVE-2023-44487 affecting package cert-manager for versions less than 1.11.2-5. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.
